---
title: "About"
---

## Background

Thirty years building software, currently retraining as a research scientist. My M.Res at the University of Reading focuses on the feasibility of constructing the first whole-cell computational model of a human platelet by extending the *wcEcoli* framework (Karr et al. 2012; Macklin et al. 2020).

## Research interests

- Whole-cell modelling and rule-based systems biology
- Platelet activation, calcium signalling, and granule dynamics
- Reproducible computational pipelines for wet-lab integration
- Practical applications of LLMs to scientific software engineering

## This site

Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org), hosted on GitHub Pages. Source is on [GitHub](https://github.com/stevehaigh/quarto-site-builder).

## Contact

The fastest route is email: [steve@haigh.bio](mailto:steve@haigh.bio).
